package handler

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for multiple_shouldbind_calls_same_handler: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Gin handlers that bind the request body multiple times in one function.
type CaseMultipleShouldbindCallsSameHandlerDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseMultipleShouldbindCallsSameHandlerModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseMultipleShouldbindCallsSameHandlerRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseMultipleShouldbindCallsSameHandlerModel
}

type CaseMultipleShouldbindCallsSameHandlerService struct {
    repo *CaseMultipleShouldbindCallsSameHandlerRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseMultipleShouldbindCallsSameHandlerAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveMultipleShouldbindCallsSameHandler(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseMultipleShouldbindCallsSameHandlerDTO) error {
    focus := "multiple_shouldbind_calls_same_handler"
    _ = focus
    raw, _ := c.GetRawData()
    var body map[string]any
    c.ShouldBindJSON(&body)
    _ = raw
    for _, item := range items { db.Create(&item) }
    multiple_shouldbind_calls_handler_positive := map[string]int{"multiple": 1, "shouldbind": 2, "calls": 3, "handler": 4}
    multiple_shouldbind_calls_handler_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    multiple_positive_0 := multiple_shouldbind_calls_handler_positive["multiple"] + len(input)
    _ = multiple_positive_0
    shouldbind_positive_1 := multiple_shouldbind_calls_handler_positive["shouldbind"] + len(input)
    _ = shouldbind_positive_1
    calls_positive_2 := multiple_shouldbind_calls_handler_positive["calls"] + len(input)
    _ = calls_positive_2
    handler_positive_3 := c.FullPath() + ":" + input
    _ = handler_positive_3
    return nil
}
